news.headline: Solana's price drops by 7.75% in 24 hours to $155.56, down 14% in the week from $184.32.
news.summary: The value of Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) has dropped by 7.75% in the last day to $155.56 from $184.32, marking a decrease of 14.0% over the week. The current price trend indicates a continuing decline for the cryptocurrency. The comparison chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Solana in the last 24 hours. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SEC ends investigation into Robinhood's cryptocurrency unit without enforcement action. Investigation began May 2024. Regulatory shift hinted. (Number of characters: 131)
news.summary: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has closed its investigation into Robinhood's cryptocurrency operations without taking any enforcement action. This comes after a period of increased scrutiny on digital asset firms. The SEC's Enforcement Division concluded the inquiry on Friday with a letter to Robinhood. The investigation, which started in May 2024, examined Robinhood's crypto services such as asset listings, custody practices, and trading operations. Initial concerns raised the possibility of securities law violations. Despite this regulatory pressure, Robinhood has since confirmed the conclusion of the SEC's investigation. This move suggests a potential shift in regulatory oversight of cryptocurrency operations.

news.headline: Famiglia Casadei selects Colangelo & Partners as its agency of record from Tuscany, a renowned ethical viticulture company.
news.summary: In the city of Florence, Italy, on February 24, 2025, Famiglia Casadei, renowned in Tuscany for their ethical viticulture practices and considered among Italy's top innovators, revealed their partnership with Colangelo & Partners. This collaboration signifies the joining of Famiglia Casadei, an esteemed player in the industry, with the reputable integrated communications agency, Colangelo & Partners, known for their specialization in fine wine, spirits, and food.

news.headline: Barclays launches Barclays Live, offering a personalized client research portal with cutting-edge tools and analytics.
news.summary: Barclays has introduced Barclays Live, a revamped client research portal in London and New York. This new platform offers a tailored experience for each client, providing access to market insights and analytical tools. With an updated interface and improved navigation, Barclays Live enables clients to make informed decisions based on real-time data. The new features include hubs that serve as a central location for evolving information. This initiative underscores Barclays' commitment to enhancing client experience and innovation in the financial industry.

news.headline: Ascend Tech Group retains 97% clients & achieves full password management with Bitwarden. Strengthening security habits.
news.summary: Today, Bitwarden, a reputable figure in password and secrets management, revealed that Ascend Technology Group, an IT services provider in Nebraska, has accomplished complete password management implementation across its client base. Impressively, Ascend Technology Group has managed to maintain a high client retention rate of 97%. By participating in Bitwarden's partner program, Ascend Technology Group offers robust credential security solutions to enterprises, assisting them in enhancing their security practices.

news.headline: Nexo partners with Acapulco Tennis Open, ATP 500 tournament, strengthening presence in Latin America.
news.summary: Nexo, a prominent digital assets wealth platform, has recently teamed up with the Abierto Mexicano Telcel presentado por HSBC (Acapulco Tennis Open), a prestigious ATP 500 tournament. This partnership marks Nexo's entry into elite sports collaborations and aims to enhance its reach in Latin America. By joining forces with this renowned event, Nexo underlines its dedication to innovation and expansion in the region. Through this alliance, both Nexo and the Abierto Mexicano Telcel presentado por HSBC demonstrate a mutual commitment to strategic growth and shared values.

news.headline: US Facilities, Inc. expands use of ISNetworld across more sectors with assistance in vendor qualification and sustainability goals.
news.summary: Dallas-based ISN, a leader in contractor and supplier information management, recently revealed that U.S. Facilities, Inc. (USF), a company specializing in integrated facilities management, has broadened its utilization of ISNetworld to include its government, transportation, and infrastructure divisions. Through this extended partnership, ISN will support USF in areas such as vendor qualification, data analysis, and sustainability objectives within these important sectors. Malik Maj, a USF representative, highlighted the company's longstanding appreciation for ISN's proficiency and the comprehensive features of its offerings.

news.headline: Trump signed memo restricting Chinese investment in the US.
news.summary: On Friday, President Trump signed a memo aimed at limiting Chinese investment in the U.S. The measure seeks to restrict the amount of funding coming from China into American businesses. This move is part of ongoing efforts to address concerns over economic ties between the two countries. The memorandum is expected to impact the flow of significant capital from China into various sectors of the U.S. economy.

news.headline: American Family Care acquires and expands in Massachusetts, bringing cost-effective care to 5 new communities.
news.summary: A major urgent care provider, American Family Care (AFC), has recently expanded its services to five more communities. With close to 400 walk-in clinics nationwide, AFC offers extended hours and affordable care options to patients in need. This expansion will benefit residents in Boston and Birmingham, Alabama, providing them with convenient access to quality urgent care services. The move signifies AFC's commitment to enhancing healthcare accessibility and efficiency in these communities.

news.headline: Frost & Sullivan praised NETSCOUT for real-time network visibility with AI-driven insights San Antonio, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: NETSCOUT offers advanced solutions that deliver valuable insights using deep packet inspection, behavioral analytics, and artificial intelligence. In San Antonio on February 24, 2025, Frost & Sullivan conducted an evaluation of the industry for next-gen application and network visibility platforms. The assessment likely included key data such as performance metrics, market trends, and potential growth opportunities within the industry. The comprehensive review may have covered aspects like market share, competitive analysis, and future prospects for companies operating in this sector. This evaluation from Frost & Sullivan provides a significant overview of the current landscape and future developments in the application and network visibility platform industry.

news.headline: Spectrum to award $1 million in 2025 grants for digital education, totaling over $11 million since 2017. Nonprofits can apply March 3-28.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance community access to digital tools, non-profit organizations are being supported through grants. Spectrum's investment in Spectrum Digital Education has surpassed $11 million since 2017. Eligible non-profits can submit grant applications between March 3-28. This initiative is based in Stamford, Connecticut, as announced on February 24, 2025.

news.headline: LG showcases heat pump solutions at IBS 2025, offering versatility for smart homebuilding. Innovations include unitary HVAC, water heating, and electrification solutions. LG is paving the way for modern builders.
news.summary: In 2025, LG Electronics will showcase its innovative unitary HVAC systems, water heating advancements, and electrification solutions at the NAHB International Builders' Show in Las Vegas. This global HVAC technology leader will present its award-winning products to modern builders attending the event. The IBS 2025 will be held on February 24th and will feature LG's cutting-edge solutions for the industry. Attendees can expect to learn about LG's latest developments in HVAC technology and water heating, as well as its offerings in electrification solutions.

news.headline: Newmark Group named on IAOP's Global Outsourcing 100 for the 16th year in a row. Nasdaq: NMRK. Prominent in real estate.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor catering to major institutional investors, global corporations, and various property owners, disclosed its latest updates.

news.headline: Booking Holdings CFO Ewout Steenbergen to speak at Morgan Stanley Conference in SF on March 5. - $BKNG
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut, on February 24, 2025 - Booking Holdings shared today that CFO Ewout Steenbergen is scheduled to engage in a fireside conversation at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco on March 5. The session is set to commence at the specified date and will feature discussions on various financial matters within the company. The event will be a part of the larger conference focusing on technology, media, and telecom sectors, offering valuable insights to attendees. Booking Holdings is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BKNG, and this announcement marks a significant development in their engagement with investors and the financial community.

news.headline: Imperial Dade strengthens presence in GA with acquisitions of Athens Janitor Supply Company & Chittom Industries, marking 97th acquisition.
news.summary: In Jersey City, N.J., Imperial Dade, a prominent distributor in North America of foodservice packaging supplies, industrial products, and janitorial supplies, has finalized the purchase of Athens Janitor Supply Company, Inc. and Chittom Industries, Inc. (jointly known as “AJS”). This acquisition marks the 97th purchase for Imperial Dade during the tenure of Robert and Jason Tillis, who serve as Chairman and CEO of the company. The financial details of the deal were not disclosed.

news.headline: Grand Marnier partners with Future to launch film series celebrating reinvention, honoring heritage. NY, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: During Black History Month this year, a well-known cognac and orange liqueur brand introduces short scenes that honor the skill of transformation in collaboration with Future, a prominent figure in hip hop. This initiative was revealed in New York on February 24, 2025, and showcases Grand Marnier®'s extended association with Future, a successful hip-hop artist with multiple platinum records.

news.headline: Jack Daniel's releases 14-Year-Old Tennessee Whiskey for the first time in a century, alongside 12-Year-Old and 10-Year-Old batches.
news.summary: In Lynchburg, Tennessee, the Jack Daniel Distillery has unveiled the launch of Jack Daniel’s 14-Year-Old Tennessee Whiskey, a rare release as it is the first time since the early to mid-1900s that Jack Daniel’s has introduced a product at this age. This year's Aged Series also features Jack Daniel’s 12-Year-Old Tennessee Whiskey Batch 3 and 10-Year-Old Batch 4, continuing the tradition of honoring the distillery's history. This introduction is part of an annual release that pays homage to the legacy of Jack Daniel's.

news.headline: Flexential on CRN's Data Center 50 list for 5th year. Recognized for scalable infrastructure.
news.summary: Charlotte based company, Flexential, known for its adaptable infrastructure catering to increasing connectivity needs, was recently acknowledged for its exceptional services. The leading provider of secure data center solutions has been featured in the prestigious Data Center 50 list by CRN®, a well-known brand of The Channel. This recognition highlights Flexential's ability to meet the escalating demands of the industry.

news.headline: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) will present at Gabelli Funds 35th Annual Pump, Valve & Water Systems Symposium on Feb 27.
news.summary: Enpro, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NPO, will be participating in the Gabelli Funds 35th Annual Pump, Valve, and Water Systems Symposium on Thursday, February 27th at 12:15 pm Eastern Time.

news.headline: The Toy Association will reveal top toy trends for 2025 at Toy Fair, driving industry sales. #ToyTrends2025 #ToyFair
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in New York, The Toy Association™ will be hosting the Toy Trends Briefing seminar to showcase the key product trends expected to boost toy industry sales leading up to the holiday season. The seminar will provide an exclusive look at the top trends that will shape the market in the coming months. The Toy Association™, known for producing Toy Fair® and serving as the official voice of the North American toy industry, will present insights on the latest developments in the sector. This event will be essential for industry professionals looking to stay ahead of the curve and capitalize on emerging trends.

news.headline: GroundTruth introduces audio ads with foot traffic attribution, linking store visits to podcast & streaming radio ads. Feb 24.
news.summary: In a recent development, advertisers are now able to connect store visits to podcast and streaming radio ads, marking a significant advancement in audio ad effectiveness. This innovation, introduced by GroundTruth, a renowned media platform recognized for generating tangible business outcomes such as in-store foot traffic, is reshaping the landscape of audio advertising. The updated system sets a new benchmark for gauging the performance of audio ads by attributing actual visits to physical stores. This development was announced in New York on February 24, 2025, reflecting a crucial shift in the audio advertising industry towards more precise metrics.

news.headline: Dr. Meera Walia joins Vehere board, bringing 40 years of medical expertise to accelerate innovation and industry leadership.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 24, 2025, Vehere, a modern cybersecurity software company, made headlines by appointing Dr. Meera Walia as an Independent Director to its Board. With more than four decades of experience in General Medicine and a strong medical background, Dr. Walia's addition is expected to bring valuable insights to the company's strategic decision-making processes.

news.headline: DeliverHealth unveils eSOne™ InstaNote, AI-operated reports solution for surgeons at HIMSS25.
news.summary: DeliverHealth, a prominent provider of software, AI, and technology-enabled services in mid-revenue cycle and digital health, has unveiled their latest product, eSOne™ InstaNote. This cutting-edge tool aims to revolutionize inpatient and outpatient documentation processes with next-generation precision. The announcement was made on February 24, 2025, in Madison, Wisconsin. This marks a significant advancement in the healthcare industry, offering enhanced efficiency and accuracy in documentation.

news.headline: UGV market projected to reach $14.88B by 2031 with 14.22% CAGR globally: Verified Market Research®. Comprehensive report released.
news.summary: A renowned business intelligence and market analysis firm, Verified Market Research®, is excited to unveil its detailed report on the Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGV) Market. The comprehensive study provides crucial information on the market size and forecast, offering valuable insights into this industry.

news.headline: Global natural botanical extract market to grow at 6.6% CAGR, driven by demand in food and personal care.
news.summary: The market for natural botanical extracts globally is categorized based on type into water-based extracts, alcohol tinctures, CO2 extracts, glycerites, and powdered extracts. It is also segmented by application into food, beverages, personal care, and household chemicals. The report from BANGALORE, India, dated Feb. 24, 2025, indicates the significant growth and potential in this market segment.

news.headline: Tandem secures $10M in pre-seed funding to transform pet healthcare with AI health hub, mobile clinics, and telemedicine.
news.summary: A pet healthcare startup based in Cambridge, Tandem, has recently obtained $10 million in pre-seed funding. The company aims to revolutionize veterinary care by providing top-notch and cost-effective healthcare for pets. Tandem, known for its mobile clinics and telemedicine services, is planning to introduce a 5000 sq ft AI-powered health hub in the upcoming summer. The innovative ecosystem offered by Tandem in veterinary medicine is driven by its own AI-operating system, seamlessly connecting various aspects of pet care.

news.headline: Veterans and advocates affected by federal layoffs as Department of Government Efficiency cuts thousands of jobs.
news.summary: The Department of Government Efficiency's efforts to reduce federal jobs have significantly impacted veterans and their supporters, who are feeling the consequences of this action resulting in thousands of job cuts.

news.headline: Verizon achieves first satellite to cellular video call with AST SpaceMobile BlueBird 2, expanding connectivity options for users.
news.summary: In Midland, Texas on February 24, 2025, Verizon and AST have achieved a milestone in mobile communication. They successfully tested a live video call between two mobile devices, one connected via satellite and the other through Verizon's terrestrial network. Verizon's network covers over 99% of the US population, meeting most wireless communication needs. Despite this, they are integrating satellite links to enhance their services. Verizon and AST are collaborating to create the fastest satellite-to-device network, offering text, voice, and live video calling. This achievement marks a significant advancement in communication technology.

news.headline: INVL Technology transferred 1,143 shares to employees on Feb 24, 2025, updating total issued shares.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, INVL Technology has transferred 1,143 of its shares to employees of its subsidiaries as part of an option agreement. The employees now have the right to exercise these options. As of the same date, the total number of issued shares by INVL Technology was disclosed.

news.headline: DeFi facilitates the selection of top-performing robots for various roles amidst rising demand for humanoid robots in different sectors.
news.summary: The increasing need for humanoid robots in various sectors has led to the adoption of DeFi-inspired systems. These systems provide a decentralized, transparent, and efficient method to pair suitable robots with specific tasks. This advancement comes as demand for humanoid robots continues to rise, with key industries looking for innovative solutions to match the right robots to the right jobs.

PBF Energy (NYSE:PBF) to participate in Scotiabank Global Energy Conference on Feb 26, 2025.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Parsippany, N.J. - PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF) revealed that its management team will be taking part in the Scotiabank Global Energy Conference on February 26, 2025. During the conference, important information will be shared regarding the company's performance and future prospects. Presentation materials will also be shared with investors for further insights.

news.headline: Gallant Capital acquires Navient Corp.'s Govt Services division for tech-enabled business processing; leader in tolling/parking technology and services.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Gallant Capital Partners, has completed the acquisition of the Government Services business segment of Navient Corporation (Nasdaq: NAVI). The acquired company, known as NGS, specializes in providing tech-enabled outsourcing services to various government entities in the United States. NGS is particularly prominent in the tolling and parking technology sector and delivers essential services such as call center support to government agencies. This acquisition marks a significant move in the government services market.

news.headline: SGI Global appoints Patrick McElwain as new CSO, with 27 years of federal law enforcement experience.
news.summary: SGI Global, LLC (SGI) has appointed Mr. Patrick McElwain as its new Chief Strategy Officer (CSO) in Fairfax, Virginia. With over 27 years of federal law enforcement experience, Mr. McElwain previously served as a special agent with HSI and the U.S. Customs Service. From May 2023 to January 2025, he held the position of Deputy Executive Associate Director (Deputy EAD) at HSI. HSI is the main investigative unit of the Department of Homeland Security.

news.headline: Chinese Auto Valley hosts global launch of Wuhan-made auto brands. VOYAH Ultra-Fast Charging Station ranks top globally.
news.summary: In a recent report by Changjiang Daily from Wuhan, China on February 24, 2025, it was announced that the VOYAH Ultra-Fast Charging Station has surpassed all others to become the top-ranking station globally for charging speed. This achievement was highlighted at the Chinese Auto Valley • Press Conference held at Dongfeng Motor Global Innovation on February 23. The event marked the global launch of auto brands manufactured in Wuhan, showcasing the city's advancements in the automotive industry.

news.headline: US 10-year bonds show supply impact, not growth surge: BMO's Davis.
Avo, a smart-on-FHIR platform integrated with MEDITECH, gains new partnerships; Moab Regional Hospital among clients.
news.summary: In New York on February 24, 2025, Avo, a clinician support platform integrated with MEDITECH and using smart-on-FHIR technology, is gaining attention in the MEDITECH community due to its recent customer acquisitions and partnerships. One notable addition is Moab Regional Hospital, a Level IV trauma center and Critical Access Hospital located in a rural area. This development highlights Avo's increasing presence as it continues to collaborate with more healthcare providers.

news.headline: Perfect Game partners with Cincy Flames to expand presence in the Midwest, boosting youth baseball opportunities.
news.summary: Today, in Sanford, Florida, Perfect Game, a leading youth baseball and softball platform and scouting service, revealed a new collaboration with the Cincy Flames, a renowned high school baseball tournament organization. This partnership brings together two significant entities in the baseball world, aiming to enhance opportunities for young players. Perfect Game, known as the largest platform for youth baseball and softball, joins forces with the esteemed Cincy Flames to further elevate the baseball landscape. This association is anticipated to have a substantial impact, as both organizations boast significant influence in the realm of youth baseball, coming together to offer enhanced experiences for players.

news.headline: Adam Back criticizes ‘EVM mis-design’ for Bybit hack, sparking debate between Bitcoin and Ethereum supporters.
news.summary: The recent Bybit hack has initiated a discussion among supporters of Bitcoin and Ethereum. Notably, Adam Back has attributed the security breach to vulnerabilities in the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), while some individuals are highlighting weaknesses in multisig protocols. This incident has drawn attention due to the substantial loss of [insert amount here] worth of funds, prompting a reassessment of security measures in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: DentaQuest earns 2nd consecutive URAC Dental Plan Accreditation, showcasing commitment to quality healthcare.
news.summary: Today, DentaQuest, a subsidiary of Sun Life U.S., proudly declared their achievement of receiving full URAC Dental Plan Accreditation on Feb. 24, 2025. This accreditation exemplifies their steadfast dedication to providing top-tier healthcare services. URAC, a reputable independent organization, granted this recognition to DentaQuest, highlighting their commitment to excellence in dental care.

news.headline: Haliey Welch's crypto venture turns sour after allegations of involvement in a scam, showcasing the risks in the industry.
news.summary: Haliey Welch, who dived into the world of cryptocurrency with much excitement, is now facing backlash due to allegations of participating in a crypto scheme.

news.headline: New rice protein, Oryzatein 2.0 by Axiom Foods, hits the market with no lead; provides clean and high-quality option.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025 in Los Angeles, Axiom Foods, a leading plant protein manufacturer, has achieved breakthroughs in cleanliness standards, resulting in a pristine color, enhanced solubility, and smooth texture. This advancement comes after the Clean Label Project released a report on the top and bottom protein powder products.

news.headline: Tesla stock surges on China FSD news, 'containable' DOGE impact by Elon Musk with FSD set for rollout in China soon.
news.summary: The stock price of Tesla increased following news that the electric vehicle company plans to introduce Full Self-Driving (FSD) technology in China in the near future. Analyst Dan Ives remarked that the influence of Elon Musk's involvement with Dogecoin is limited and will not alter the trajectory of the EV company significantly. This boost in Tesla stock came amidst positive sentiment regarding the potential rollout of FSD in China, emphasizing the company's commitment to innovative technology. The impact of Musk's actions on Dogecoin is seen as manageable, according to Ives, a long-time supporter of Tesla.

news.headline: Express Employment Professionals wins Best of Staffing Client and Talent Awards, also earns Diamond Award for client satisfaction.
news.summary: Express Employment Professionals in Oklahoma City has received recognition for their exceptional performance, winning the Best of Staffing Client and Talent Awards presented by ClearlyRated. This victory adds to their impressive track record, as they maintain their status as a Diamond Award winner for client satisfaction. This achievement showcases Express Employment Professionals' commitment to providing top-notch services to both clients and talent in the employment industry.

news.headline: CoinShares has no exposure to Bybit exchange, confirmed on 24th Feb 2024. Listed on Nasdaq Stockholm (CS) and US OTCQX (CNSRF).
news.summary: On February 24th, 2024 in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited, a prominent global investment company focusing on digital assets, stated that it does not have any involvement with the Bybit exchange. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm as CS and US OTCQX as CNSRF, is ensuring transparency in its operations.
